articles.title: Jalpaiguri: Tea Garden Workers Brave Scorching Heat #Gallery - Social News XYZ

articles.full_text:
Jalpaiguri: Tea garden workers use umbrellas while plucking tea leaves amid scorching heat at a tea garden in the Malbazar area of Jalpaiguri district on Friday, May 15, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
